title: Judy Robe & Spirit Awards
intro: The Judy Robe & Spirit Awards celebrate the heart of PYT. Presented before the first performance of every show, these awards honor performers whose dedication, generosity, and spirit make our shows magical. Our biggest honor, the Judy Robe Award goes to the ensemble member who best embodies the values of our beloved supporter Judy Robe. Spirit Awards go to three or four performers each show, who have represented PYT's values of Braveness, Boldness, and Kindness throughout the production run.
